mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.parent_id, m.type, m.permission, m.icon, m.sort, m.visible, m.dashboard_id, m.created_at FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(m.parent_id, 0), m.sort ASC, m.id ASC
SELECT id, name, path, component, parent_id, type, permission, icon, sort, visible, dashboard_id, created_at FROM sys_menu ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, 0), sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, path, component, parent_id, type, permission, icon, sort, visible, dashboard_id, created_at FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_menu WHERE path = #{path} AND (#{excludeId} IS NULL OR id <> #{excludeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (name, path, component, parent_id, type, permission, icon, sort, visible, dashboard_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{path}, #{component}, #{parentId}, #{type}, #{permission}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{visible}, #{dashboardId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, parent_id = #{parentId}, type = #{type}, permission = #{permission}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, visible = #{visible}, dashboard_id = #{dashboardId} WHERE id = #{id}
